heading: Requirement of reports by States
label: 290cc–28 Requirement of reports by States

children.text: securing a record and a description of the purposes for which amounts received under were expended during the preceding fiscal year and of the recipients of such amounts; andsection 290cc–21 of this title
determining whether such amounts were expended in accordance with the provisions of this part.

children.heading: Availability to public of reports
children.label: b Availability to public of reports
children.text: The Secretary may not make payments under unless the State involved agrees to make copies of the reports described in subsection (a) available for public inspection.section 290cc–21 of this title

children.heading: Evaluations
children.label: c Evaluations
children.text: The Assistant Secretary for Mental Health and Substance Use shall evaluate at least once every 3 years the expenditures of grants under this part by eligible entities in order to ensure that expenditures are consistent with the provisions of this part, and shall include in such evaluation recommendations regarding changes needed in program design or operations.
